projections:
  - position: 1
    system: "elastic"
    template: "doc-fetch-falco-alert / falco-container-timeline / launch-network-tool-container / container-timeline-summary"
    events:
      - agent:
          name: "elastic-agent-soc-playground"
          id: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"

          ephemeral_id: "eph-0001-soc-playground"
          version: "8.13.0"

          snapshot: false
        message: "Warning Falco: Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container (user=svc.monitoring user_loginuid=1009 command=nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port> parent=bash container_id=ffbff1299702 container_name=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image>)"
        cloud:
          availability_zone: "us-east-1a"
          instance:
            name: "soc-playground"
            id: "i-soc-playground-01"
          provider: "aws"
          service:
            name: "ec2"
          region: "us-east-1"
        input:
          type: "filestream"
        "@timestamp": "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
        ecs:
          version: "8.11.0"
        data_stream:
          namespace: "default"
          type: "logs"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
        falco:
          output: "Warning Falco: Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container (user=svc.monitoring user_loginuid=1009 command=nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port> parent=bash container_id=ffbff1299702)"
          output_fields:
            "user.uid": 1009
            "proc.pname": "bash"
            "evt.type": "execve"
            "proc.cmdline": "nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port>"
            "user.name": "svc.monitoring"
            "proc.exepath": "/usr/bin/nc"
            "container.id": "ffbff1299702"
            "evt.arg.flags": ""
            "user.loginuid": 1009
            "container.name": "ffbff1299702"
            "container.image.repository": null
            "proc.name": "nc"
            "proc.tty": 0
            "evt.time": 1748966454976000000
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          rule: "Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container"
          source: "syscall"
          time: "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
          priority: "Warning"
          tags:
            - "network"
            - "container"
        host:
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          os:
            kernel: "5.15.0-107-generic"
            codename: "jammy"
            name: "Ubuntu"
            family: "debian"
            type: "linux"
            version: "22.04.3 LTS"
            platform: "ubuntu"
          containerized: false
          ip:
            - "172.18.0.1"
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "soc-playground-host-id"
          mac:
            - "02:42:ac:12:00:01"
          architecture: "x86_64"
        event:
          agent_id_status: "verified"
          ingested: "2026-06-04T14:00:55.100Z"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
      - agent:

          type: "filebeat"
          ephemeral_id: "eph-0001-soc-playground"

        message: "Warning Falco: Write below monitored dir (user=svc.monitoring user_loginuid=1009 command=bash -c echo >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys container_id=ffbff1299702 container_name=ffbff1299702)"
        cloud:
